exercises.audioScript: Let me tell you something important.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे तुम्हें कुछ ज़रूरी बात बतानी है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Let me tell you something important.
exercises.answer: Let me tell you something important.

exercises.audioScript: Don't let the children play outside now.
exercises.hindiScript: अभी बच्चों को बाहर खेलने मत दो।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Don't let the children play outside now.
exercises.answer: Don't let the children play outside now.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.audioScript: Let me walk you through the plan.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे तुम्हें plan के बारे में step-by-step बताने दो।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Let him walk you through the plan.
Let me walk away from the plan.
Let me walk you through the plan.
Let us walk through the plan.
exercises.answer: Let me walk you through the plan.

dictationPassage.text: Let me introduce myself. My name is Priya. Let me explain what I do. I work in marketing. Let us begin with a small example. Don't let small problems distract you. Let them pass. Let go of stress and focus on results.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मुझे अपना परिचय देने दो। मेरा नाम प्रिया है। मुझे बताने दो कि मैं क्या करती हूँ। मैं marketing में काम करती हूँ। हमें एक छोटे example से शुरू करने दो। छोटी problems को तुम्हें distract मत करने दो। उन्हें जाने दो। Stress को जाने दो और results पर focus करो।
